items.name: <![CDATA[Show HN: Talos – Open-source WASM interpreter for Lean]]>
items.summary: At Cajal (YC W26) we’re excited to share Talos (https://github.com/cajal-technologies/talos), an open source framework for formal verification of WebAssembly modules in Lean.AI is now writing tons of the code that gets pushed to production. As code generation gets cheaper, verification becomes the bottleneck.
